Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER
